summary: A centered hero KPI anchors the upper body while proof and supporting metrics sit in slimmer side or lower clusters.
composition_pattern: centered hero KPI with side or lower proof supports
support_structure: side proof clusters or narrow metric stacks
when_to_use: The headline KPI should read as the visual center of gravity
The proof can support from the edges without challenging the hero
avoid_when: The page needs a strong left-to-right argument rhythm
The central chart should dominate more than the KPI
